summary: Energetic early‑1979 MSG show highlighted by a ripping Shakedown Street and Jerry’s soaring solo, captured on an audience tape that is decent but hampered by occasional PA problems.
review: The performance is widely praised – the crowd roared for the opening of the second set with Shakedown Street, Cassidy got a big reaction, and Jerry Garcia delivered an unforgettable solo around the 3:50 mark.  The recording is an audience source that retains the raw live vibe, though listeners note the PA struggled on the last three songs and overall sound quality is only okay to good.

ai_rating.rationale: Most reviewers rate the show positively (4‑5 stars) and highlight strong performances, while a few point out PA and sound quality issues that keep the overall rating from being higher.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Generally decent tape capture with raw ambience; occasional PA failures on the final three songs and overall clarity described as "just okay" by some reviewers.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set kicks off with a high‑energy Shakedown Street, maintaining an upbeat momentum through Cassidy and Jerry’s solo, though the tail end suffers from PA problems.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Multiple reviewers highlight a spectacular solo around 3:50 and overall strong guitar work.
